cost_name: Owner's Costs — PM, Legal, Insurance, Permitting, Land — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: AACE factored estimate: owner's costs ~6% of total CAPEX. Includes project management team, legal and permitting, construction all-risk insurance, land lease/purchase, development costs, and owner's contingency management.

confidence.rationale: Standard for industrial projects. Hydrogen-specific: IPCEI application costs, RFNBO certification preparation, and French ICPE/enquête publique permitting costs add ~1-2% vs standard industrial.

primary_drivers: Land status (already owned vs purchase vs long-term lease)
Insurance market maturity for hydrogen (limited claims history)
Developer experience (first project = higher owner's cost)
